description: You are a Threat Intelligence Engineer tasked with integrating the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog into Wazuh's detection pipeline. Create a Wazuh CDB lookup list in /var/ossec/etc/lists/ containing at least 10 CVE IDs from the catalog at /tmp/cisa_kev.json. The integration must include a custom detection rule referencing this CDB list to generate alerts, the configuration of the Wazuh vulnerability detection module (syscollector wodle) in ossec.conf, and a threat intelligence integration report of at least 60 words.
